'''This individual''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The [[Curator of Records]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], this man was the last to hold this post, escaping the Temple during the start of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], this man was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], this man studied as a [[Lore Keeper|Jedi Lore Keeper]], eventually gaining the title of [[Curator of Records]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Serving throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], this Master was stationed at the Temple when the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the Republic, [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], betrayed the Republic and issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="TCPL" />

When [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] led the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] against the Temple, the Curator gathered what records he could and fled. Arriving on [[Toola/Legends|Toola]] to serve out his exile, the Curator took up residence in a cave in the frozen wasteland, but his hidden retreat was not long kept hidden. Eventually, Darth Vader and the 501st hunted him down and executed the Curator and burned his books. The Curator's body disappeared into the Force, while most of his books were lost in the fire.<ref name="TCPL" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
